BLOCKED ENTITIES
─────────────────

• Name confusion
• Location confusion
─────────────────
GIVENNAME, SURNAME,
TITLE, CITY, STREET

ROUTABLE ENTITIES
─────────────────
LLM provides benefit:
• Pattern recognition
• Format validation
─────────────────

TELEPHONENUM: +15.2%
EMAIL: +8.4%
SOCIALNUM: +12.1%
DATE: +5.7%

span.p:
Extract Context Window
─────────────────
window_size = ±400 characters
Word boundary alignment
─────────────────
Format: '...prefix>>> TOKEN <<

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Generate Cache Key
─────────────────
key = MD5(token | context | prev_label | pred)
Example: 'a1b2c3d4e5f6...'

span.p:
CACHE HIT
─────────────────
Return cached result
Skip LLM API call
─────────────────
Saves: ~$0.002/call
Latency: ~500ms

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CACHE MISS
Proceed to LLM call

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Format Prompt (V9)
─────────────────
Include:
• Valid labels list (43 labels)
• Context window
• Previous label for BIO check
• Conservative guidance:
'When uncertain, choose PII'

OpenAI API Call
─────────────────
model: gpt-4o
temperature: 0.0
response_format: json_object
max_tokens: 150
─────────────────

─────────────────
model: qwen2.5:3b
temperature: 0.0
format: json
─────────────────
Cost: Free (local)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Validate Response
─────────────────
1. Label in VALID_LABELS_SET?
2. BIO Consistency Check:
• I-X cannot follow O
• I-X must match prev B-X/I-X
3. Fallback if invalid

─────────────────
FIFO eviction at max_size=1000
Key: MD5 hash
